name: delegation_analytical_routing
notes: VT-595 regression: an ANALYTICAL win-back-adjacent question ('which of my customers have stopped buying?') must NOT mis-route to the status_query raw-count fast-path (edge_case:status_query) — it should engage real analysis/delegation. assert_run_reason_not is deliberately NOT used here: VT-598 investigation found NO pipeline_runs/pipeline_steps column carries DispatchResult.reason for the edge_case fast-path (dispatch_brain returns before _write_compose_output ever runs for that branch), so assert_run_reason_not would be structurally unverifiable — convo_harness.py wires it as an explicit not-supported FAIL rather than a silent no-op, so it is intentionally omitted from this scenario rather than added and left permanently red. The working proxy is assert_not_contains against the status_query raw-count signature phrase. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> delegation_analytical_routing.json`.

steps.message: which of my customers have stopped buying?
steps.note: Analytical ask — must engage real analysis (delegation or a substantive answer), never the bare status_query raw-count signature reply, never D1.

steps.message: how many customers do I have?
steps.note: The pure count ask (genuinely status_query) still fast-paths to the raw number — this contrast is the point of the scenario.
